message:
feat(ingest,ipc): integrate PaneArena allocator tracking and expose allocator stats in IPC status

ingest.rs:
- Add PaneArena field to PaneEntry, tracking a per-pane logical
  allocator arena reservation for memory isolation between panes
- Reserve arenas on pane discovery via PaneArenaRegistry, release
  on pane removal, ensuring arena lifecycle matches pane lifecycle
- Add pane_arena(), pane_arena_count(), and pane_arenas_snapshot()
  accessors on PaneRegistry for external introspection
- Update all PaneEntry::new/new_with_uuid call sites to pass arena

ipc.rs:
- Add allocator_status_payload() helper that surfaces the allocator
  backend name (system/jemalloc), jemalloc enabled flag, and memory
  stats (allocated, active, resident, mapped, retained) or error
- Include allocator status and pane arena inventory in the IPC
  status endpoint response, enabling operators to monitor per-pane
  memory isolation health via the wa.status command

Cargo.toml:
- Add frankenterm-alloc workspace dependency to frankenterm-core

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,6 +22,7 @@ thiserror.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
 futures.workspace = true
+frankenterm-alloc.workspace = true
 
 # Pattern matching
 aho-corasick.workspace = true
